title: scleria terrestris
intro: Scleria terrestris, also known as the earth sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The earth sedge is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
